category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Malaysia market access under SIRIM, ST MEPS, and MCMC requirements.

title.en: China-to-Malaysia Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Malaysia ST MEPS mandatory energy efficiency, SIRIM mandatory product certification, and MCMC EMC requirements for 415 V 50 Hz market access.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与马来西亚 ST MEPS 强制能效、SIRIM 强制产品认证及 MCMC EMC 要求的差距对照（适用于 415 V 50 Hz 市场准入）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與馬來西亞 ST MEPS 強制能效、SIRIM 強制產品認證及 MCMC EMC 要求的差距對照（適用於 415 V 50 Hz 市場准入）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SIRIM conformity assessment, ST MEPS registration determination, customs clearance decision, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Malaysian SIRIM, ST, MCMC, SEDA, customs, and market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SIRIM 合格评定、ST MEPS 注册裁定、清关决定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行马来西亚 SIRIM、ST、MCMC、SEDA、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SIRIM 合格評定、ST MEPS 注冊裁定、清關決定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬來西亞 SIRIM、ST、MCMC、SEDA、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: SIRIM mandatory product certification, ST MEPS registration (IE2 minimum, IE3 direction), voltage re-rating from 380 V to 415 V, and MCMC EMC approval are the key gaps; Chinese CCC certification is not recognised in Malaysia.
answer_first.zh: SIRIM 强制产品认证、ST MEPS 注册（最低 IE2，方向为 IE3）、电压重新定额（380 V 升至 415 V）以及 MCMC EMC 审批是主要差距；中国 CCC 认证在马来西亚不被认可。
answer_first.zht: SIRIM 強制產品認證、ST MEPS 注冊（最低 IE2，方向為 IE3）、電壓重新定額（380 V 升至 415 V）以及 MCMC EMC 審批是主要差距；中國 CCC 認證在馬來西亞不被認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
